prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约1301→943→609→569→567名，整体呈显著上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年趋于稳定在560–610区间，2025年基准约567名；本省招生计划2021–2022年均为15人，2023年增至26人，2024年30人，2025年29人；2026年计划19人，较2025年大幅缩招约34.5%，竞争压力理论上有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名中哈尔滨工业大学校本部2026年位列第12名，近年排名持续上升（2021年第11→2026年第12），威海校区共享校本部品牌声誉，对考生吸引力强；2026年高考周期内哈工大声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；2024年曾因校园全面开放获正面关注；整体报考心理稳定，未出现明显负面信号；哈工大校本部第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科17个，其中A+学科包括力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程；A学科包括计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、仪器科学与技术、土木工程等；威海校区招生专业（工科试验班AI+先进技术、机器人与智能装备等）与上述王牌学科高度关联，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业为工科试验班（未来信息）和工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班），涵盖计算机、人工智能、自动化、电子信息等当前高热专业方向；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（不确定），按历史比例估算理科/物理类考生约30720人，较2025年物理类30457人略有增加，竞争基数小幅上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次567名、2026年计划大幅缩招34.5%（理论上缓解竞争）、哈工大品牌持续强势、AI/计算机类专业热度不减、以及青海省考生总数小幅增加等多重因素，但考虑到近3年位次已高度稳定在560–610区间、缩招幅度虽大但绝对人数仅10人、以及学校品牌对考生的持续吸引力。预测2026年最低位次约480名，区间422–538名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信）（2024年招生专业）
- 工科试验班（电气与自动化）（2024年招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（先进材料与智能制造类拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（智慧生态环境类拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈工大（威海）在青海省仅设1个招生专业（工科试验班未来信息），位次在预测区间内（422–538名）可积极报考；位次优于区间下限（<422名）录取把握较大；位次接近区间上限（>538名）需谨慎，建议搭配其他985/211院校作为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1301 → 943 → 609 → 569 → 567, showing a significant upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), stabilizing in the 560–610 range in recent three years, with a baseline of about 567 in 2025; provincial enrollment plans were 15 in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 26 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 19, a substantial reduction of about 34.5% compared to 2025, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, the main campus of Harbin Institute of Technology ranked 12th in 2026, with rankings rising in recent years (from 11th in 2021 to 12th in 2026); the Weihai campus shares the brand reputation of the main campus, strongly attracting candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, HIT's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; in 2024, it gained positive attention for full campus opening; overall application psychology is stable, with no obvious negative signals; HIT's main campus has 17 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including A+ disciplines such as Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering; A disciplines include Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, and Civil Engineering; the Weihai campus enrollment majors (Engineering Pilot Class AI+ Advanced Technology, Robotics and Intelligent Equipment, etc.) are highly related to these top disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors are Engineering Pilot Class (Future Information) and Engineering Pilot Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class), covering currently hot majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, and Electronic Information; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 30,720 science/physics candidates based on historical proportions, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, leading to a small rise in competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 567, the substantial 34.5% reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (theoretically easing competition), the continued strong brand of HIT, the sustained popularity of AI/computer majors, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Qinghai, but also noting that rankings have been highly stable in the 560–610 range in recent three years, the absolute reduction in enrollment is only 10 people, and the continuous attraction of the school brand to candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 480, with a range of 422–538.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (AI + Advanced Technology Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer and Electronic Communication) (2024 enrollment major)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Electrical and Automation) (2024 enrollment major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Advanced Materials and Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Smart Ecological Environment Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, HIT (Weihai) only offers one enrollment major (Engineering Pilot Class Future Information) in Qinghai Province; candidates with rankings within the predicted range (422–538) can actively apply; those with rankings better than the lower limit (<422) have a high chance of admission; those with rankings near the upper limit (>538) should be cautious and consider other 985/211 universities as safety options.
